title: Consumption Growth In Chinas Retail Sector Remains Well Below 2025S Peak
section_path: Consumption Growth In Chinas Retail Sector Remains Well Below 2025S Peak
section_path_text: Consumption Growth In Chinas Retail Sector Remains Well Below 2025S Peak
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, China's retail sales in August grew year-on-year by 3.4%, which has marked the lowest growth seen since November. Taking August's 0.4% deflation into account, retail sales adjusted for inflation/deflation grew year-on-year by 3.8%. This is just above the 3.7% seen in July.
